name: HRY_PI_RTI_TRANSACTION_STATUS
description: To store the transaction status of all employees fetched from the ATOM Feed

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_STATUS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to the table hry_pi_rti_transaction_status

columns.Name: PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table pay_pay_relationships_dn

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_all_payrolls_f

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_all_people_f

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_legislative_data_groups

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the person fetched from ATOM Feed

columns.Name: IS_ENQUEUED
columns.Comments: Status of whether the person is enqueued for processing

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Response of the ADP Delivery API

columns.Name: ITERATION_NO
columns.Comments: Count of the number of times ADP Response API has been hit

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: Error Code generated from ADP Delivery API

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Error Message generated from ADP Delivery API

columns.Name: HIRE_DATE
columns.Comments: Hire Date for the new hire. This is equal to the Effective Start Date for the newhire.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the PAY_PAYROLL_ACTIONS table for the online extract run.

columns.Name: EXTRACT_MODE
columns.Comments: Mode of the extract submission, for example, ONLINE or BATCH.

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_SETUP_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the integrator for which the newhire is processed.

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of event for which the ATOM feed is analysed, for example, HIRE.

columns.Name: FEED_SOURCE_NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates the infrastructure from where the data came into the table, e.g., ATOM, ESS.

columns.Name: FEED_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the feed which comes as a response to the ATOM API call.

columns.Name: FEED_ENTRY_UPD_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: Updated timestamp for the each of the new hire being preocessed. This is equal to the Effective Start Date for the newhire.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: column used to store the Legislation Code of the payload

columns.Name: FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: column used to store the file name of the payload

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is intended to hold notification date of person's termination

columns.Name: ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is intended to hold actual termination date of person's termination
